stemHtml: ATC instructs aircraft X-BC: "X-BC squawk ident". What action is required?

options.a: Radar has correlated the observed blip with aircraft XY-ABC.
options.b: X-BC must reselect the currently assigned mode and code.
options.c: X-BC must press the IDENT feature on the transponder.
options.d: X-BC should execute an identification turn of at least 020 degrees.
